problem id: be05952c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  11100011 -> 00001100
  10011010 -> 00000001
  01011100 -> 00000001
  01001111 -> 10000000
  10000111 -> 10000000
  01111111 -> 10000111
  11110010 -> 00001110
  11110001 -> 00001110

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 00000001
